title: rostellularia adscendens var. hispida
intro: Rostellularia adscendens var. hispida, also known as the Australian fleabane or Native mullein, is a flowering plant native to Australia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rostellularia adscendens var. hispida include treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, which are often used topically to soothe skin irritations and internally to alleviate respiratory issues.
